$comment: FC17.9(h) C23 #embed (D-PP-EMBED): runtime witness for the quote-form scalar #embed splice across the legs, RUN on BOTH the baseline (debug) AND the `release` (shippedPipeline) arm. `#embed "answer.bin"` splices the resource's 5 bytes {42,13,10,26,0} as a comma-separated decimal int list into a `static const unsigned char blob[]` initializer; the program checks sizeof(blob)==5 + blob[1..4] byte-exactly (13/10/26/0) so it SELF-WITNESSES binary-mode read AND git byte-integrity (blob[1]==13 is the CRLF-normalization canary — see the examples/**/*.bin binary .gitattributes override), then returns blob[g_i] where g_i is a mutable global 0 (the anti-fold pattern) so the release arm proves the embedded array is materialized + indexed at runtime, not const-folded. The aux resource answer.bin sits next to main.c and resolves self-dir (quote-relative to the includer) with zero harness change. exit = blob[0] = 42.
